title: PaxStressia constants file (rules/constants.json)
description: Every tunable in the simulation, named exactly as referenced in DESIGN.md §18.5. All values PROPOSED until the v0.5 history-calibration pass; every balance change is a one-line diff here.

spread_threshold.description: Strength above which a faction spreads over open edges (v0.4, §18.5).

collapse_dist_decay.description: Distance discount on collapse threat per hop from the capital (v0.5, §18.5).

press_freedom.description: Strength of the free press (v0.6): higher makes suppression more likely to leak — democracies can't hide things (§6 Transparency Dial).

leak_base.description: Base per-turn leak chance for a suppressed scandal.

leak_age_factor.description: Added leak chance per turn the suppression ages.

leak_clock_turns.description: Turns a suppressed scandal can survive before it is buried for good.

leak_multiplier.description: A leak costs this multiple of the honest disclosure — the gamble's downside.

bloc_consolidate_rate.description: Stage gained per turn by an authoritarian bloc (§5.4).

bloc_pressure.description: International-legitimacy drain per bloc stage per turn (pooled propaganda).

bloc_expansion_grievance.description: Grievance a consolidated bloc exports to adjacent civilian regions per turn.

exposure_decay.description: Exposure lost per turn without upkeep — the truth fades (§20).

exposure_patron_relief.description: How much full exposure raises the price of the rival patron's offer.

exposure_bloc_relief.description: How much full exposure blunts a bloc's propaganda pressure.

patron_competitiveness_intl.description: Weight of your International standing in resisting patron capture.

patron_competitiveness_exposure.description: Weight of regime Exposure in resisting patron capture.

sanctions_exposure_min.description: Exposure needed before a targeted designation bites (§20.4).

sanctions_intl.description: International gained by a well-evidenced designation.

sanctions_patron.description: Patron influence stripped by a designation.

sanctions_bloc_slow.description: Bloc stage rolled back by a designation.

sanctions_exposure_cost.description: Exposure spent to mount a designation.

negotiate_min.description: Lower strength bound for a faction to be negotiable (stalemate band, §7).

negotiate_domestic_cost.description: Domestic cost of negotiating ('soft on terror').

negotiate_international_gain.description: International gained by a negotiated settlement.

pax_abroad_min.description: Abroad score (Stabilization × OrderMultiplier) needed to count as holding the line, for the endings matrix (§11).

integrity_clean_min.description: IntegrityMultiplier at/above which you count as having kept clean hands (endings matrix).

norm_feedback.description: Master gain on the global norms/precedent layer (§21). 0 = off (single-theater scenarios); >0 in grand mode so choices ripple worldwide.

norm_decay.description: Per-turn pull of each world norm back toward neutral (50) — the world forgets.

norm_kinetic_per_use.description: How much each military initiative raises the global kinetic norm.

norm_law_per_use.description: How much each governance/diplomatic/exposure initiative raises the global rule-of-law norm.

norm_autocracy_per_tier.description: How much each Emergency-Powers (drift) tier raises the global autocracy norm.

norm_recruit_weight.description: How strongly a kinetic/autocratic world precedent fuels recruitment in every theater.

norm_intl_weight.description: How strongly world norms move International each turn (law rewarded, force/autocracy punished).

norm_patron_weight.description: How strongly an autocratic world norm raises rival-patron appeal everywhere.

market_feedback.description: Master gain on the global arms/oil markets (§21). 0 = off (single-theater); >0 in grand.

market_adjust.description: Per-turn smoothing of a market toward its conflict/instability target.

arms_baseline.description: Mean insurgent strength treated as a neutral arms market.

arms_conflict_weight.description: How strongly world conflict raises the arms market.

arms_supply_weight.description: How strongly a hot arms market lifts insurgent ExternalSupport in every theater.

oil_instability_weight.description: How strongly instability in oil-producing nations raises the oil market.

oil_domestic_weight.description: How strongly a high oil market drags the importer-democracy's Domestic standing.

rivalry_feedback.description: Master gain on multi-patron rivalry (§8). 0 = off (single-theater keeps mercenary-only); >0 in grand.

rivalry_adjust.description: Per-turn smoothing of the rivalry score toward the share of the world captured.

patron_strength_gain.description: Global reach a patron gains per turn per state aligned to it.

patron_bandwagon.description: How strongly a globally ascendant patron captures faster everywhere.

rivalry_bandwagon.description: How strongly a high rivalry score (much of the world captured) accelerates further captures.

sanctions_patron_global.description: Global reach a targeted designation strips from the backing patron — deny one state, weaken it everywhere.
